Document:
# Core Rule 13 - In-game administration rulings are final
Admin actions are based on our rules and guidelines each rule has a direct policy associated. We reserve the right to use our judgement in unclear cases, and our rulings are final.
If you have an issue with an admin ruling, you may appeal it in the discord ONLY if it has the Appealable tag / notation. This means you cannot appeal every admin ruling, and you should not expect to be able to appeal every admin ruling. However, after the ban sentence has been served, you may appeal the now note in the discord if you want to remove the note.
If you find that an admin is abusing their power, you can report them in the discord.
## Examples
### Permitted
- Reporting admin abuse in the discord. - Explaining your side of things to an admin.
### Not Permitted
- Complaining in ahelp over admin rulings. - Job ban evasion via in game promotion.
